gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just did its daily rounds, checking on all the community apps in the greenhouse and updating their metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and greenhouse documentation up-to-date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot checking on a digital greenhouse. The robot holds a clipboard with metrics while Polly waters small code-plants in lime green pots.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot watering small code-plants in a digital greenhouse while a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot watering small code-plants in a digital greenhouse while a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holds a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
